lastTicket.title: Agent-skill CLI surface: doctor, --json, skills install, why, --explain, serve, run
next_steps: P1: yah doctor — health check (versions, .yah/ integrity, rig reachability)
P2: --json everywhere — universal structured output flag on hack/arch/board
P3: yah skills install --harness {claude-code|cursor|aider|generic}
P4: yah why <ID> — one-shot ticket-context synthesis
P5: --explain everywhere — agent-readable preview
P6: yah serve consolidation (HTTP+MCP+RPC behind one binary; depends on Stage 8)
P7: yah run — wrapper routing to configured agent (claude-code, pi-mono, etc.)
Out of scope: yah relay-server --stdio (covered by R019)

lastTicket.title: yah skills install --harness {claude-code|cursor|aider|generic}
next_steps: Generalize current 'yah board init' (claude-code only) into a multi-harness installer
claude-code backend: .claude/commands/*.md + .claude/settings.json MCP entry
cursor backend: equivalent paths under .cursor/
aider backend: .aider.conf.yml MCP block
generic backend: emit a JSON manifest the user can hand to any harness
Re-use existing yah/templates/ for slash commands + claude-md snippet
verify: yah skills install --harness claude-code in a fresh workspace populates .claude/ correctly

lastTicket.title: Universal --json flag on hack/arch/board commands
next_steps: Audit which commands already accept the flag (board open, board tickets); list the gaps
Cover all yah hack <verb> commands (operation result + diff stats)
Cover all yah arch <verb> commands (query results, validation violations)
Cover board status, board inflight, board claim, board move
Convention: when set, suppress human formatting; one JSON doc on stdout, errors on stderr
verify: every yah subcommand accepts the flag without erroring
